calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-16-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Petitioner: Kyung Khim present for the minor in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to : Sally Khim.
Decree signed in open court.
